titleStmt.title: SII 24.246: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 246. (A.R. No. 96 of 1937-38.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers a sale of land to the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by two brothers Aḻagapperumāḷ alias Kōyilkāttaperumāḷ-Nambi and Āḻvār alias Nalantigaḻ-Nārāyaṇa Amudaṉār of Kuḍavāyil. The record is dated in the fourth regnal year and the details of date viz., Siṁha, śu. 8, Tuesday, Aṉusham seem to correspond to A.D. 1317 August 16, Tuesday, ·32. But Aṉusham ended at ·75 on the previous day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 rūpāy nālāvatu siṅhanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum cevvāykkiḻamai yum peṟṟa Aṉuḻattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkat tiruppatiyil śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷil kuṭavāyil Aḻakapperumāḷāṉa koyilkāttaperumāḷ nampiyum En tampi Āḻvārāṉa nalantikaḻ ṉārāyaṇa Amutaṉārum Ivviruvom
tirunantavaṉa nilavilai pramāṇam . perumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiya tevar tiruṉāmat tāl Ivvūril vaitta Akaram kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukku Iṟṟai ṉāḷāl nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta tirunantavaṉamāvatu . tirukkuṟaippaṟṟil teṉṉoḻukil Eṉṉutāna tirunantavaṉattukku Icaitta kiḻpār kellai kulaśe khara brahmārāyaṉ tirunantavaṉattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai maṉṟacca viḷākattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum mipārkkellai cakravā
ḷinampi tirunantavaṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai tirumuṭikkuṟaikkup perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikkut teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉ kellaikku naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa tirunantavaṉam kol 5(1/2) Ittirunantavaṉam kol Añcaraiyum cakravāḷinampi tirunantavaṉa vāttalaikku meṟkum tirunaṟaiyūr dāsan tirunantavaṉattukku vaṭakkum nalantikaḻ nārāyaṇa Amutanār paṟṟāy nāyanār mutta tiruvaṭikku vilai koṇṭa nilattukku kiḻakkum tirumuṭikkuṟaikkup perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruviti
kkut teṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaikku naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa Uṇmeṭu tirunantavaṉam 4 ṉāl kuḻi 2 100 2 10 Ikkuḻi Irunūṟṟu Irupatum Ākak kol Añca raikkum kuḻi Irunūṟṟu Irupatukkum Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅkum naṟ U 100 Ippaṇam nūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟak kaiykkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom bhaṭṭarkaḷukku koyilkāttaperumāḷ nampiyum nalantikaḻ nārāyaṇa Amutanārum Ivviruvom Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ittiru
nantavaṉakkol Añcaraiyilum Uṇmeṭu kuḻi Irunūṟṟu Irupatilum melṉokkiṉa maraṅkaḷum kiḻṇokkina kiṇaṟukaḷum bhāgamum bhāgāśraya ṅkaḷum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷum Uṭ(p)paṭa viṟṟukkuṭut tom Ittirunantavaṉam kol Añcaraikkum Uḷmeṭu kuḻi Irunūṟṟu Irupatukkum Ippaṇam nūṟume vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭ celavolaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolai kāṭṭavum
kāṇavum kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭicammatittu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟakkaik koṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom bhaṭṭakaḷukku koyil kāttaperumāḷ nampiyum nalantikaḻ nārāyaṇa Amutaṉārum Ivviru vom Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutto[m . I]pramāṇappaṭi mulyamāṉa paṇam nūṟum kārimā ṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyakkāliṅkarāya brahmārāyaṉ pakkalile paṟṟikkoḷḷukaiyil Ituve krayadravyac celavu kaiyyiṭāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu
vilai pramāṇam [ paṇṇikkuṭutto] m kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukku kuṭavāyil Aḻakapperumāḷāṉa koyilkāttaperumāḷ nampiyum Eṉ tampi nalantikaḻ ṉārāyaṇa Amutaṉārum Ivviruvom viṟṟukkuṭut tamaikku Ivai kuṭavāy Aḻakapperumā(ḷ)ḷāṉa koyilkāttaperumāḷ nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṭavāyil Āḻvārāṉa nalantikaḻnārāyaṇa Amutanār Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ Apekṣikka Inta tirunantavaṉa nilavilai pramāṇam Eḻutinamaikku
Ivai bhāradvāśi tirumuṭikku ṉampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭiaṟiveṉ śrī vaiykunta dāsaṉeṉ Ippaṭiaṟiveṉ tiruma ṭa perumāḷ dāsaṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 24.246 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
